summary: Tested Panel Experts section. All 5 flip cards found with correct data-testids. Individual image URLs are correctly implemented in EXPERTS_DATA. All 5 expert names render correctly.

ui_bugs.component: ExpertFlipCard - Cards 0,1,2 (Dr. Tanay Seetha, Saumil Seetha, Hemlata Sojitra)
ui_bugs.issue: The circular photo frames for the first 3 experts still appear to show small/dark images with text visible inside. Cards 3 & 4 (Shruti Sharma, Shilpa Agarwal) display clean individual portraits. This is likely because the uploaded image files themselves for experts 0-2 contain text/group photo content - the CODE is correct (uses individual URLs with object-cover object-top). Main agent needs to re-upload cleaner portrait photos for the first 3 experts.

action_items: Image files for Dr. Tanay Seetha (jjx4u1fr), Saumil Seetha (shqytquc), Hemlata Sojitra (rcq5jar4) appear to contain text or are the old group photo - re-upload clean individual portrait photos for these 3 experts
critical_code_review_comments: Code implementation is CORRECT - ExpertFlipCard uses inside 148x148 rounded-full div. The issue is with the uploaded image file content, not the code.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Panel Experts section code is correct. 5 cards display with individual URLs. Cards 3 & 4 show clean portraits. Cards 0-2 images appear to have text/old content - likely the uploaded photos themselves are not clean individual portraits.
